daily.today_energy: Mercury's moving through your sector of self-expression, so you're basically magnetic rn. Channel that restless fire energy into something creative—your vibe is unmatched today.
daily.love: Someone's picking up on your authentic energy and honestly, they're into it. Whether you're single or coupled up, vulnerability hits different right now. Let them see the real you.
daily.career: Your ideas are actually hitting different today. Speak up in meetings or pitch that thing you've been sitting on. The universe is backing your bold moves—trust the momentum.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement, not restriction. Dance, hike, stretch—whatever makes you feel alive. Also drink water because you're probably dehydrated and blaming it on Mercury.
